```sparql
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT(?hours * 60 + ?minutes AS ?total_minutes) WHERE {
  {
    ?game wdt:P750 wd:Q334634 .
    ?game wdt:P751 wd:Q650840 .
  } UNION {
    ?game wdt:P750 wd:Q650840 .
    ?game wdt:P751 wd:Q334634 .
  }
  ?game wdt:P2047 ?duration .
  BIND(xsd:integer(REPLACE(STR(?duration) , 'PT(\\\\d+)H.*' , '$1')) AS ?hours)
  .
  BIND(xsd:integer(REPLACE(STR(?duration) , '.*?(\\\\d+)M' , '$1')) AS ?minutes)
}
ORDER BY(?hours * 60 + ?minutes)
OFFSET 2
LIMIT 1
```
